choices.text: Sun-Earth L2 = 1.5M km opposite Sun. Earth + Sun + Moon all in same direction → single sunshade blocks heat → cold side ~50K perfect for infrared. JWST in halo orbit avoids Earth shadow. ~3-5 m/s/year stationkeeping.
Only L4/L5 (60° ahead/behind in orbit) stable if mass ratio < 0.0385. Sun-Jupiter Trojans naturally accumulate there. L1/L2/L3 are saddle points — unstable; need stationkeeping fuel.
